text.description: The content to synthesize into speech.

voice.description: Optional managed voice identifier or preset name.

language.description: Optional language tag such as zh-CN or en-US.

provider.description: Optional managed route hint. Leave empty or use auto unless pinning is required.

format.description: Preferred output audio format such as mp3 or wav.

seed.description: Optional reproducibility seed when supported by the route.

notes.description: Optional extra constraints confirmed with the user.
